prompt: I'm on Heepsy's Starter plan and want to find Instagram beauty influencers in the US with 10K-50K followers. How do I set up my search and make the most of my 500 credits?
assertions: Walks through the search filter setup including platform, category/niche, location, and follower range filters
Explains that audience demographics and authenticity scores require the Plus plan or higher, and suggests upgrading or alternative vetting approaches for Starter users
Provides credit conservation advice such as pre-filtering with free search filters before opening detailed analytics reports

prompt: I want to connect my Shopify store to Heepsy so I can track which influencers are driving sales. What plan do I need and how do I set it up?
assertions: States that Shopify integration requires the Advanced plan or higher and is not available on Free, Starter, or Plus plans
Describes the setup process including connecting the Shopify store, creating campaign offers from the product catalog, and assigning tracking links or codes to creators
Mentions that the integration provides real-time sales attribution so you can see which influencers drive revenue

prompt: My Heepsy credits are running out too fast. I'm on the Plus plan with 2,000 reports per month but I keep burning through them before I find enough influencers for my campaigns.
assertions: Explains that each analytics report view consumes one credit and that revisiting a previously viewed profile in the same billing period is free
Recommends narrowing search results with free filters before clicking into detailed profiles to conserve credits
Suggests practical strategies like building shortlists from the search results preview before spending credits on full analytics
